itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.description: Explore Jemaa el-Fnaa, the souks, and Majorelle Garden. Cooking class in a traditional riad.

itinerary.title: Atlas Mountains
itinerary.description: Drive through the dramatic Tizi n'Tichka pass and the stunning Dades Gorge.

itinerary.title: Sahara Desert
itinerary.description: Camel trek into the Erg Chebbi dunes. Sleep under the stars at a luxury desert camp.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Sunrise over the dunes before the journey back to Marrakech.

title: Sahara Desert Odyssey
description: An immersive desert journey from the bustling souks of Marrakech to the silent dunes of the Sahara. Camp under the stars and ride camels at sunrise.
